visual_notes: Defining characteristic is banded or patterned appearance — concentric, plume, fortification, or other structured color patterns. The concentric fortification pattern in cross-section looks like aerial topography or castle walls.
prompt_fragments: layered silica archive in waxy translucent bands
vibe_notes: Agate is a mineral calendar — each band a record of deposition. In cross-section it reads like geologic stratigraphy compressed into a hand-held nodule. The fortification pattern is one of the most compelling natural geometries.
folklore_summary: The name 'agate' is ancient, recorded by Theophrastus around 315 BCE. Believed to protect against storms, calm thirst, and bring luck in Greek and Roman traditions.
